title: hieracium caesium subsp. dichtlianum
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. dichtlianum, also known as Mountain Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the liver and gallbladder, and its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hieracium caesium subsp. dichtlianum include its potential to treat liver and gallbladder disorders, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Mountain Hawkweed is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
